body:
transfem-supervillianess:

gentlyevilvt:

Just remembered how, as a kid, I came up with a character whose big weakness was that if you touched her neck in any way she’d go all helpless and do whatever you say. Good job kid me you have great taste also when you grow up you will know several women who have this weakness in real life and are happy for you to take advantage of it.

Haha! It’s over heroine! For I have been informed of your secret weakness! One touch to the neck and you- Oh wow you’re moaning just like that? Pfttt loser that’s all it took? Wow aren’t you just adorable. You’ll do whatever I say? Wow~
